plans.title: V1.24 Knowledge ↔ Crates Alignment — normative spec refresh and Local API / KB semantics
plans.notes: Done. Batches A–E complete. QC tri-review: 3× Approve (0 Critical, 0 Warning). QA: clippy clean, all tests pass. 352 lines dead code removed (daemon context/assemble proxy). Work-scope KB isolated and documented.

metadata.description: Refresh normative knowledge specs to match 2026-05-22 crates; align Local API docs with daemon router; resolve context/assemble and work-KB vs World-KB naming.
metadata.next_action: Archive plan per Profile B done-compaction.

batches.name: A — Normative doc refresh
batches.notes: Commit 51852a5. §4 refreshed, boundary routes rebuilt, AGENTS.md aligned.

batches.name: B — Context assemble B2
batches.notes: Commit ddc193a. 352 lines dead code removed. DaemonClient::call_assemble() retired.

batches.name: C — Work KB semantics C2
batches.notes: Commit 7f63bc3. Work-scope docs/comments enforced. New test added.

batches.name: D — Tracker hygiene
batches.notes: Commit 75fdd8d. DF-42, DF-43 added to deferred tracker. V1.24 snapshot added.

batches.name: E — QA + QC
batches.notes: QC tri-review 3× Approve. 0 Critical, 0 Warning. 6 non-blocking suggestions registered as residuals.

2026-05-22-v1.24-knowledge-crates-alignm.note: Intentional per KCA-002 B2. Dead code is scaffolding for future cloud-stage integration.

2026-05-22-v1.24-knowledge-crates-alignm.note: Consider upgrading debug! to warn! (once-per-process) so operators notice the cloud-stage gap.

2026-05-22-v1.24-knowledge-crates-alignm.note: Consider explicit scope rejection when full KB route redesign happens.
